meaning: n.[鸟]噪鹊(产于印度、澳洲、新几内亚的鸟类之一)
examples: The koel, a tropical cuckoo that lurks in thick cover, has a rising bisyllabic wolf-whistle.
A koel bird never makes her own nest. She lays her eggs in other nests.
The toddler joined VVV's star midfielder Ken Leemans in De Koel Stadium on Tuesday before being offered the "symbolic" contract.
